description: Abyssal Depths Patch 6 (6 October 2025) — Season 27 Winner Statues, UI improvements, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Bows, Daggers, Fire Staffs, Frost Staffs, Hammers, Quarterstaffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, Spears, Armors, Battle Mounts), Fixes.

sections.heading: Season 27 Winner Statues Unveiled
sections.description: Statues erected in Conqueror's Hall for Season 27 winners: Kool Aid, All Rise, and Statement.
sections.searchable_text: Season 27 Winner Statues Kool Aid All Rise Statement Conquerors Hall

sections.heading: Changes
items: The World Map, Region Map, and Minimap now uniformly display the region name, zone type, and region tier
Player, guild, and alliance names can now be clicked in most UIs to open their details menus
sections.searchable_text: Changes World Map Region Map Minimap region name zone type tier player guild alliance names clicked details menus

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Enchanted Quiver Bow Damage bonus within 6m 235% 220% Multishot Damage 127 116 Slow no longer applies diminishing returns

changes.raw_text: Enchanted Quiver: Damage bonus if enemy within 6m: 235% → 220%
Multishot: Damage: 127 → 116; Added: Slow no longer applies diminishing returns (still reduced by existing diminishing returns)
notes: Slow no longer applies diminishing returns (still reduced by existing diminishing returns)

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Combustion Infernal Staff Fear duration 1.25s 1.5s Spontaneous Combustion Flamewalker Staff Impact damage 200 189

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Groundbreaker Polehammer Range 16m 20m Giant Steps Forge Hammers Armor 0.2 0.30 Magic Resistance 0.35 0.30

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Phantom Twin Phantom Twinblade Multicast cooldown 0s 1s Multicast time window 4s 5s Recasting no longer removes existing areas

changes.raw_text: Phantom Twin: Multicast cooldown: 0s → 1s; Multicast time window: 4s → 5s; Recasting no longer removes existing areas.
notes: Recasting no longer removes existing areas (stacking two areas will not deal double damage)

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Seedling's Bloom Rootbound Staff Removed 10% healing received Added 10% max current health Serpent's Gaze Stillgaze Staff Enemy damage reduction 80% 70% Added 70% healing reduction Sylvian Transformation Rootbound Staff team hp 10% 8% Tether Shift Cooldown 15s 18s

changes.raw_text: Seedling's Bloom: Removed 10% higher healing received. Added 10% max and current health increase.
notes: Removed: 10% higher healing received
Added: 10% max and current health increase

changes.raw_text: Serpent's Gaze: Enemy damage reduction: 80% → 70%; Added 70% healing reduction.
notes: Added 70% healing reduction

subsections.heading: Spears
subsections.searchable_text: Spears Lunging Strike no longer applies diminishing returns slow duration

changes.raw_text: Lunging Strike: No longer applies diminishing returns (duration is still reduced by existing slow diminishing returns)
notes: No longer applies slow diminishing returns (duration still reduced by existing slow DR)

subsections.heading: Battle Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Battle Mounts in-combat movement speed health reduced increased Gold Crystal Ancient Ent Battle Eagle Battle Rhino Behemoth Colossus Beetle Flame Basilisk Goliath Horseeater Juggernaut Phalanx Beetle Roving Bastion Siege Ballista Tower Chariot Venom Basilisk

changes.raw_text: Multiple battle mounts had their in-combat movement speed reduced and health adjusted (lower tiers reduced, higher tiers increased). Key changes: Silver/Gold/Crystal Battle Eagle: Move speed 50%→40%, Gold/Crystal health increased. Bronze/Silver/Gold/Crystal Battle Rhino: Move speed 40%→20%, health adjusted. Silver/Gold Roving Bastion: Move speed 30%→10%, Silver Juggernaut/Tower Chariot: health reduced. Gold/Crystal Phalanx Beetle, Behemoth, Ancient Ent (Gold/Crystal): health increased. Flame Basilisk, Venom Basilisk: speed reduced. Goliath Horseeater: speed 30%→20%.
notes: Gold Ancient Ent: Health 8238 → 9062
Crystal Ancient Ent: Health 10479 → 12575
Silver/Gold/Crystal Battle Eagle: Move speed 50% → 40%; Gold health 5731→6304; Crystal health 7289→8747
Bronze Battle Rhino: Move speed 40% → 20%; Health 3347 → 3682
Silver Battle Rhino: Move speed 40% → 20%; Health 4731 → 5677
Gold Battle Rhino: Move speed 40% → 20%; Health 6268 → 8148
Crystal Battle Rhino: Move speed 40% → 20%; Health 7973 → 11162
Gold Behemoth: Health 9312 → 10243; Crystal Behemoth: 11845 → 14214
Silver Colossus Beetle: Health 7028 → 6325; Crystal: 11845 → 13030
Flame Basilisk: Move speed 40% → 30%
Silver/Gold/Crystal Goliath Horseeater: Move speed 30% → 20%; Gold health 7163→7879; Crystal 9112→10934
Silver Juggernaut: Health 7299 → 5839; Gold: 9671 → 8704
Gold Phalanx Beetle: Health 8954 → 9849; Crystal: 11390 → 13668
Silver Roving Bastion: Move speed 30% → 10%; Health 7434 → 6691
Gold Roving Bastion: Move speed 30% → 10%
Crystal Roving Bastion: Move speed 30% → 10%; Health 12529 → 13782
Siege Ballista: Health 4477 → 5820

Venom Basilisk: Move speed 40% → 30%

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Serpent's Gaze (Stillgaze Staff): Fixed issue where target would not be stunned correctly if hit while channeling
Dual Nature (Forgebark Staff): Fixed issue where targets with CC immunity could still sometimes be rooted
Swift Cut (Assassin Shoes): Fixed issue where damage would not be dealt to mounted players
Soulshaker (Grailseekers): Spell description now correctly states that cooldown is doubled after recasting
Blueflame Torch now increases Bonus Damage as intended
Fixed issue where 'Eat xx Fish' Albion Journal missions could be completed by casting spells while wearing fishing equipment
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Serpent's Gaze Stillgaze Staff stunned Dual Nature Forgebark Staff CC immunity rooted Swift Cut Assassin Shoes mounted players Soulshaker Grailseekers cooldown doubled Blueflame Torch Bonus Damage Albion Journal Eat Fish fishing equipment
